eurusd.title: Euro rises as Trump delays Iran strike, USD weakens
eurusd.summary: The Euro advances late in the North American session, up by 0.26% amid a volatile session characterized by geopolitical headlines and broad US Dollar weakness across the board. At the time of writing, the EUR/USD pair trades at 1.1654 after bouncing off daily lows of 1.1608.

eurusd.title: EURUSD bangs against target resistance at 1.1655. Can the buyers get through the target.
eurusd.summary: In the morning kickstart video, I commented on the 1.1655 level as a key target. xauusd.title: ICYMI - Goldman cuts US recession odds to 25% as Hormuz closure impact stays contained
xauusd.summary: Goldman Sachs cuts its 12-month US recession probability to 25% from 30%, with chief economist Jan Hatzius citing resilient activity and easing financial conditions despite the Strait of Hormuz closure.Summary:US recession probability cut to 25% from 30%, with economic activity holding up and financ

xauusd.title: Ghana seeks 30% of large gold mines’ output for local refineries
xauusd.summary: Africa’s largest bullion producer is seeking an additional 10% on top of the current 20% that large mines must sell to the state-owned Ghana Gold Board.

xauusd.title: Gold steadies as USD slips, Fed hike bets cap upside
xauusd.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) price steadies on Monday after reaching a daily low beneath $4,500, as the US Dollar is on the back foot amid fears that the energy shock spurred by the Middle East conflict could trigger a second wave of inflation.

xauusd.title: Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD buyers are losing the battle
xauusd.summary: XAU/USD bottomed at $4,480 at the beginning of the week, its lowest since late March, as a dismal market sentiment fueled demand for the US Dollar (USD).

xauusd.title: Zambia forms gold venture to formalize mining, build processing
xauusd.summary: The new vehicle will operate in a part of North-Western Province that was the site of a disorderly gold rush that began last year.

xauusd.title: Russia fails to sell stake in gold miner UGC as no one bids at auction
xauusd.summary: The 67.2% stake in UGC - one of Russia's top 10 gold miners - was valued at 140.43 billion roubles.

xauusd.title: Ghana seeks to buy 30% of gold from miners to boost reserves, central bank
xauusd.summary: The government revamped the gold purchase program in February, targeting up to 157 tons (15 months of import cover) by 2028.

xauusd.title: Gold back to $5,400? Here’s why Goldman Sachs still sees bullish potential ahead
xauusd.summary: Central banks are expected to increase their Gold purchases in 2026, analysts at Goldman Sachs say, supporting a much-needed boost to the precious metal toward the end of the year.

xauusd.title: Gold silver prices firmer but gains remains capped by higher oil prices as Strait of Hormuz remains closed - AM Report
Gold is on a Selling Spree
xauusd.summary: Investors are offloading the precious metal due to rising bond yields. The factors that have driven the dollar higher since March have returned.
